mitre_mappings.Process Hollowing (T1055.012): Correlate malfind (PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE with MZ headers) against pstree. High probability if target is svchost.exe.
mitre_mappings.DLL Sideloading (T1574.002): Analyze AppData execution paths. IMPORTANT: Exclude signed UCRT deployments (api-ms-win-*).
mitre_mappings.Command and Scripting Interpreter (T1059: Analyze cmdline for powershell.exe -enc, -w hidden, or cmd.exe executing from \Temp\ or \Public\.
mitre_mappings.Application Layer Protocol (T1071): Correlate netscan active outbound sockets with pstree. Flag non-network binaries (calc, spoolsv) establishing connections.

execution_mandate: Do not hypothesize based on single metrics. Triangulate cache data across pstree, netscan, and malfind. Extract anomalous inodes using icat for cryptographic verification.
